# Lessons — Engine Discipline Cycle

## META-LEVEL-24 (42nd-layer): Literal-Shell Gate Execution

The 42nd-layer discipline requires literal shell execution per D-449(a).

This lesson was identified at the 42nd-layer of meta-level analysis. However,
earlier drafts of this lesson erroneously referred to the 43rd-layer of
meta-level analysis, which caused confusion about which layer was being closed.

The correct layer is 42nd-layer. The 43rd-layer reference above is the injected
drift that this fixture validates the script detects.
